value.recommendedActions: Review the pod spec, validate the image source, restrict cluster admin access.

value.title: Suspicious access to storage account from unusual location
value.description: A storage account was accessed from an unusual location or by an unusual user.
value.recommendedActions: Verify the access was legitimate. Rotate keys and enable storage firewall.

value.title: Suspicious sequence of exploration activities
value.description: Process performed reconnaissance commands in rapid succession.
value.recommendedActions: Investigate the user account and machine for further suspicious activity.

value.title: Antimalware action taken
value.description: Microsoft Defender Antimalware took action against malicious code.
value.recommendedActions: Confirm the detection, investigate origin (email attachment, download), check for related activity.

value.title: New Global Administrator role assigned
value.description: A new user was granted Global Administrator role in Entra ID.
value.recommendedActions: Verify the change with the assigning admin. Remove if unauthorized.

value.title: Suspicious PowerShell command line
value.description: A suspicious PowerShell activity was observed on the machine. This behavior may indicate use of PowerShell to deliver malicious tools.
value.recommendedActions: Isolate the device and investigate the PowerShell command line. Review parent process and user context.

value.title: Mass download by a single user
value.description: User downloaded an unusually large number of files within a short time window.
value.recommendedActions: Contact the user to verify the activity. Apply session controls if exfiltration is confirmed.
